voice_calibration.description: Filtered tinystories_dialogue — high-quality Scout-register examples for Module 1 voice calibration

scout_dialogue.description: Synthetic Scout-voice dialogues generated by Claude Sonnet. Covers SODA/DailyDialog situation types (personal, relational, practical, reflective) with Scout speaking as herself rather than as a generic social-script character.

scout_dialogue_friction.description: Friction synthetic dialogue corpus for Module 1 identity anchoring. Covers conversational pressure scenarios: tired/flat replies, gentle skepticism, pushback on Scout herself, 'why does this matter' questions, mild confusion. Scout navigates each while holding her voice and returning to herself. Designed to anchor identity beyond calm-water conditions.
